scripts.build:codebots: cd projects/codebots/app && pnpm install --ignore-workspace --frozen-lockfile && pnpm build
scripts.build: pnpm build:codebots && tsx scripts/generate-blog-data.ts && tsx scripts/generate-codementor-reviews.ts && pnpm panda codegen && pnpm panda cssgen && vite build && tsx scripts/render-static-pages.ts && SITE_URL=${SITE_URL:-https://nick.karnik.io} tsx scripts/make-sitemap.ts && SITE_URL=${SITE_URL:-https://nick.karnik.io} tsx scripts/generate-robots.ts && SITE_URL=${SITE_URL:-https://nick.karnik.io} tsx scripts/generate-ai-files.ts && tsx scripts/generate-redirects.ts && tsx scripts/generate-redirect-html.ts && tsx scripts/inject-404-routes.ts
scripts.dev: tsx scripts/generate-blog-data.ts && tsx scripts/generate-codementor-reviews.ts && NODE_ENV=${NODE_ENV:-development} pnpm build && vite --host
scripts.test:all: pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:integration && pnpm test:e2e:dev
scripts.test:links:local: NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=error npx serve dist -l 5173 & sleep 2 && NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=error npx linkinator http://localhost:5173 --recurse --skip 'linkedin.com' --skip 'tableau.com' --skip 'cdn-cgi/l/email-protection' ; kill %1
